steps.t: The road to Old Man Willow has taken you deep into the Old Forest. You should pick up the summoning horn to call Marigold to your side.
The wood-trolls are corrupting the forest. You should defeat their leader, Gulmúk Dampmould.
Though the wood-trolls have lost their leader, fell spirits continue to flock to the Old Forest. You should destroy the sword that has been summoning …
